subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down in the Palace adorned with His mighty and wondrous remembrance, wherein the Call hath been raised at dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن فی قصر زینه بذکره العزیز البدیع و فیه ارتفع الندآء فی الصباح
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @prayer for prosperity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
